_comment: Site manifest — every public page in pages/ listed once with title, section, description. Used by site.js for nav highlighting and (future) search.

site.name: RAPP
site.tagline: Single-file AI agents. Engine, not experience.

sections.label: About
sections.description: Who RAPP is for, how it gets adopted, what it doesn't try to be.

pages.title: Anatomy of a digital organism
pages.description: The full visual diagram: DNA, soul, organs, senses, cells, memory, skin, egg — every layer mapped from biology to code.

pages.title: Ecosystem map
pages.description: Force-directed map of every kody-w/* repo. Color = category, size = degree, edges = cross-repo references. See which repos cluster vs which drift isolated.

pages.title: Prompt ledger
pages.description: Append-only menu of prompts that exercise RAPP primitives — federation, swarms, eggs, planting, twins. Click any to copy.

pages.title: Leadership one-pager
pages.description: Workshops become production-bound agents. Same week. One file.

pages.title: Partner one-pager
pages.description: What partners receive, what they build, what they own.

pages.title: How a session runs
pages.description: 60-minute customer session → working agent by week's end.

pages.title: Security & compliance
pages.description: Local-first by design. What leaves the device, what doesn't.

sections.label: Retired surfaces
sections.description: Static HTTP 410 tombstones retained at their historical URLs. These entries do not run capabilities.

pages.title: Retired · vBrainstem
pages.description: HTTP 410 tombstone. The former browser capability runtime is unavailable pending a conformant replacement.

pages.title: Retired · Tether
pages.description: HTTP 410 tombstone. The former browser tether and artifact producer are unavailable.

pages.title: Retired · Sphere
pages.description: HTTP 410 tombstone. The former doorman and browser inference surface are unavailable.

sections.label: Product
sections.description: What the platform actually does, with examples.

pages.title: FAQ
pages.description: Straight answers — how is RAPP different from GPT, Copilot, Studio?

pages.title: FAQ slide
pages.description: Single-slide version of the FAQ for a presentation deck.

pages.title: Platform one-pager
pages.description: The whole product in one page.

pages.title: Use cases
pages.description: What teams actually build with RAPP, by industry and shape.

pages.title: RAPP vs Codex (and the rest)
pages.audience: Skeptic asking 'why not just use Claude Code'
pages.description: Feature-by-feature. The most-advanced AI coding agent of 2026 (OpenAI Codex / Claude Code / Cursor) writes code; RAPP networks the result. Sega-vs-Nintendo style receipt page for the skeptic who thinks they should just vibe-code their own.

pages.title: 20 problems they still need to solve
pages.audience: Skeptic who needs the punchy version
pages.description: Slide-by-slide deck enumerating the 20 substrate problems every other AI agent tool, framework, SDK, or platform still owes you. Scroll or arrow-key. RAPP shipped them all; competitors haven't started.

pages.title: Roadmap
pages.description: Post-v1 directions that must honor the v1 contract.

pages.title: Release notes
pages.description: Tagged releases, immutable per Article XIX.

sections.label: Tutorials
sections.description: Hands-on walkthroughs. Bundle the agent, bundle the cartridge, run the routing.

pages.title: Hatch your first .egg
pages.description: Install the egg_hatcher agent (one file, no kernel changes), then hatch the bundled sample-session.egg to see manifest-schema routing run end-to-end. Works offline.

sections.label: Docs
sections.description: The contract, the agent guide, the SDK reference.

pages.title: Docs index
pages.description: Cards for SPEC, AGENTS, ROADMAP, VERSIONS, skill, SDK.

pages.title: SPEC
pages.description: v1 wire contract for the single-file agent format. Frozen.

pages.title: ROADMAP
pages.description: Post-v1 directions.

pages.title: AGENTS
pages.description: Guidance to AI assistants editing this repo.

pages.title: VERSIONS
pages.description: Tag history and rollback discipline.

pages.title: skill.md
pages.description: Canonical AI-readable skill manifest.

pages.title: Rapplication SDK
pages.description: SDK-shaped reference for building rapplications.

pages.title: QR Front Gate (mandatory)
pages.description: Every neighborhood's planted index.html MUST display a tether QR on first paint (Article LI). Spec + canonical drop-in snippet (QRious + auto-detect deploy URL + graceful degrade to plain-URL text when the CDN is unreachable). Conformance is binary; non-conforming gates flag a warning in the federation roll-up.

sections.label: Vault
sections.description: Long-form decision narratives — why every non-trivial choice was made the way it was.

pages.title: Vault home
pages.description: Real Obsidian vault of founding decisions, removals, manifestos. Static SPA viewer.

sections.label: Metropolis
sections.description: Decentralized index of active RAPP neighborhoods. Kazaa-style tracker; anyone can fork + run their own.

pages.title: RAPP Metropolis
pages.description: Live directory of planted neighborhoods. Brainstems are the seeders. Agents are the work. The protocol is the network.

root_pinned.title: Pitch playbook
root_pinned.description: 6-slide deck framing RAPP as an adoption layer. URL grandfathered at root.
